name: Cauliflower-Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 32 oz French style green beans (drained), 2 cans OR
16 oz frozen French style green beans, thawed
32 oz red kidney beans, rinsed and drained
1 cup green onions, chopped, about 10 medium
1 small head cauliflower, coarsely chopped, about 4 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dressing, sugar, mustard, and garlic in a large glass or plastic bowl, blending well.
2. Add the green beans, kidney beans, onions, parsley, and cauliflower to the bowl and toss to coat evenly.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for about 3 hours or until well chilled, stirring occasionally.
4. Just before serving, drain any excess liquid from the salad if needed.
5. Line a salad serving bowl with lettuce leaves.
6. Spoon the salad onto the lined bowl.
